queries.question: For each radio station, list the programs they broadcast.
queries.sql: select radio_stations.station_name , programs.program_type_name from Radio_Stations_Programs join Programs on Radio_Stations_Programs.program_type_id = Programs.program_type_id join Radio_Stations on Radio_Stations_Programs.radio_station_id = Radio_Stations.station_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?station_name ?program_type_name WHERE {
  ?radio_stations_programs a :Radio_Stations_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?radio_stations_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?radio_stations a :Radio_Stations .
  ?radio_stations_programs p:hasRadio_Stations ?radio_stations .
  ?radio_stations p:station_name ?station_name .
  ?programs p:program_type_name ?program_type_name .
}

queries.question: Show me the programs every radio station broadcasts.
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.program_type_name  from Radio_Stations_Programs join Programs on Radio_Stations_Programs.program_type_id = Programs.program_type_id join Radio_Stations on Radio_Stations_Programs.radio_station_id = Radio_Stations.station_id   GROUP BY Radio_Stations_Programs.program_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Radio_Stations_Programs.radio_station_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Radio_Stations)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the programs every radio station broadcasts.
